rationale: Primary entity name field at top of Articles of Dissolution.

label_verbatim: FIRST: A statement of intent to dissolve the corporation was filed with the Secretary of State on ___ (date)
rationale: Date the prior Statement of Intent (NP_MNPCA-11) was filed; the Articles of Dissolution must post-date it. New key under dissolution.* — distinct from filing.date_signed (when this form is signed).

label_verbatim: SIXTH: The address of the registered office of the corporation in the State of Maine is ___ (inline trailing blank, right side)
rationale: Inline trailing blank ending the SIXTH paragraph (rect right-side, narrow). Same multi-line registered_office.address_line{1,2} pattern as sister forms NP_MNPCA-11 / 11A / 11C / 11E. Drafter originally collapsed both fields 3 and 4 into a single registered_office.address — corrected to the established line1/line2 split.

label_verbatim: SIXTH: ___ (street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Wide labeled line below the SIXTH paragraph for the registered-office address (street, city, state, zip). Drafter originally collapsed this into the same key as field 3 — corrected to the address_line2 convention.
Date the Articles are signed (top-left of page 1). Same widget placement as sister NP_MNPCA-11.

label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature) / (type or print name and capacity) — first signer (top-right, y≈700-720)
rationale: First authorized officer's printed name and capacity. Shape D (combined name+capacity), per filing.signer_N.printed_name_and_capacity primitive established on sister NP_MNPCA-11 / 11A / 11C.

label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature) / (type or print name and capacity) — second signer (right side, y≈633-652)
rationale: Second authorized officer's printed name and capacity. 13-B MRSA §104.1.B requires only one authorized officer to sign, so the second slot is optional. Same convention as NP_MNPCA-11.

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up

rationale: Total fees ($10 base per page-0 header plus expedite premium).

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
Email address to use for annual report reminders
rationale: Annual-report reminder email (rarely meaningful on a dissolution but the cover-letter widget is present).
